/* eslint-env browser */ 'use strict'; function getChromeVersion() { const matches = /(Chrome|Chromium)\/(?<chromeVersion>\d+)\./.exec(navigator.userAgent); if (!matches) { return; } return Number.parseInt(matches.groups.chromeVersion, 10); } const colorSupport = getChromeVersion() >= 69 ? { level: 1, hasBasic: true, has256: false, has16m: false } : false; module.exports = { stdout: colorSupport, stderr: colorSupport };
